title: The Ladder Of Numbers
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Rewrite each sum down to a numeral to earn the key.
help: This room is about rewriting with the two addition laws. `forward(Nat, lhs, rhs, eq, motive)` replaces `lhs` with `rhs`, the motive being the goal with `_` at the spot. Shortcut: `by rewrite(add_succ)?;` (or `by rewrite(add_zero)?;`) infers the arguments and suggests the full `by forward(…) then …;` step. Finish all 3 lemmas. (1) add_left_zero is one axiom: `by add_zero(n);`. (2) one_plus_zero: rewrite with add_succ (motive `_ = s(z)`) to reach `⊢ s(add(z, z)) = s(z);`, then rewrite the inner `add(z, z)` with add_zero (motive `s(_) = s(z)`) and close with `by refl(Nat, s(z));`. (3) one_plus_one is the same shape: add_succ, then add_zero, then `by refl(Nat, s(s(z)));`.
